title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work?
A: Eligibility for remote and hybrid work is determined based on the nature of the job role, performance metrics, and departmental needs. Employees interested in these work arrangements should discuss their eligibility with their direct supervisor. Expectations for remote and hybrid work include maintaining productivity levels, adhering to scheduled work hours, and ensuring availability for virtual meetings. Employees are required to have a reliable internet connection and a suitable workspace to perform their duties effectively. Regular communication with team members and supervisors is essential to ensure alignment with company goals. Performance reviews will include assessments of how well employees meet these expectations while working remotely or in a hybrid capacity.
